aniilog.name: Emberpup
aniilog.description: The lively creatures like to follow Flameruffs around. Once the smoldering fur starts to burn, they thrive.

forms.name: Basic
forms.description: The lively creatures like to follow Flameruffs around. Once the smoldering fur starts to burn, they thrive.

forms.name: Highland
forms.description: Emberpups living in the mountains have rock-like fur colors and a shaggy coat created by the mountain winds.

forms.name: Mountain Woods
forms.description: Emberpup living in sunny mountain forests have warm golden-yellow fur tips that seem to leave traces of sunshine as they run.

aniilog.name: Glacy
aniilog.description: They are elegant and kind aniimo that always take care of weaker ones, and freeze anyone who crosses them in ice.

forms.name: Basic
forms.description: They are elegant and kind aniimo that always take care of weaker ones, and freeze anyone who crosses them in ice.

forms.name: Snowfield
forms.description: Glacies living in cold regions have their gills and tail fins covered in solid ice shells. The biting cold proclaims the majesty of the Lord of Ice and Snow.

forms.name: Prismana
forms.description: Prismana power flows softly through Glacy, like sunlight passing through its body and scattering across its scales in radiant color.

aniilog.name: Scorchhowl
aniilog.description: They enjoy the thrill of the fight since flame and burning mark their growth.

forms.name: Basic
forms.description: They enjoy the thrill of the fight since flame and burning mark their growth.

forms.name: Thunderstorm
forms.description: Struck by thunder, their muscles are enhanced, and the flames all over them turn blue as they burn hotter.

forms.name: Prismana
forms.description: Unstable Prismana energy sets Scorchhowl's spirit ablaze. One glare from it, and weaker hearts start to crumble.

itemlog.name: Chroma Ore
itemlog.description: A vibrantly colored mineral that gleams with a unique luster in sunlight.

itemlog.name: Azur Grass
itemlog.description: Dense clusters of blue flowers forming perfect spherical blooms. Dismantle to obtain Credits.

itemlog.name: Gargantuan Claw
itemlog.core_effect: Each level of the equipped Aniimo grants an additional 0.8 BREAK.
